Title: Register a New User
Preconditions: None
Test Data:
- Valid email: test@example.com
- Valid password: Passw0rd!
- Valid name: John Doe
- Valid username: johndoe
Test Steps:
1. User initiates the registration process by calling `registerUser()`.
2. Main system requests data verification from the Users Database using `verifyValidData()`.
3. Users Database verifies the provided data and returns the result.
4. Main system receives the verification result and confirms successful registration if `y = true`.
5. Main system confirms registration failure if `y = false`.
Expected Result:
- Successful registration message is displayed if `y = true`.
- Error message is displayed if `y = false`.

Title: Login with Valid Credentials
Preconditions: A registered user exists in the Users Database.
Test Data:
- Valid email: test@example.com
- Valid password: Passw0rd!
Test Steps:
1. User initiates the login process by calling `userLogin(email, password)`.
2. Main system sends a validation request to the Users Database using `validUser(email, password)`.
3. Users Database verifies the credentials and returns the result.
4. Main system confirms successful login if `x = true`.

Title: Login with Invalid Credentials
Preconditions: A registered user exists in the Users Database.
Test Data:
- Invalid email: invalid@example.com
- Invalid password: wrongpassword
Test Steps:
1. User initiates the login process by calling `userLogin(email, password)`.
2. Main system sends a validation request to the Users Database using `validUser(email, password)`.
3. Users Database verifies the credentials and returns the result.
4. Main system confirms failed login if `x = false`.

Title: Create a New Trip
Preconditions: A registered user exists in the Users Database.
Test Data:
- Valid city: Paris
- Valid country: France
- Valid start date: 2023-10-01
- Valid end date: 2023-10-10
- Valid place to visit: Eiffel Tower
- Valid category: Landmark
- Valid plan ID: 1
Test Steps:
1. User creates a new trip with specified details.
2. Trip includes a place to visit named "Eiffel Tower".
3. Place to visit belongs to the category "Landmark".
4. Trip has a plan with ID 1.
5. User lists all trips after creation.
Expected Result:
- Trip is successfully created and listed.
- Associated place to visit and category are correctly linked.
- Plan ID is correctly set.

Title: Update Existing Trip Details
Preconditions: An existing trip exists in the Trips Database.
Test Data:
- Updated city: London
- Updated country: United Kingdom
- Updated start date: 2023-11-01
- Updated end date: 2023-11-10
Test Steps:
1. User initiates the update trip process by calling `updateTrip()`.
2. Main system requests new data from the user.
3. Main system updates the trip data in the Trips Database using `updateTripData(x)`.
4. User lists all trips after updating.
Expected Result:
- Trip details are updated successfully.
- Updated trip is listed correctly.

Title: Change User Profile Successfully
Preconditions: A registered user exists in the Users Database.
Test Data:
- Valid new email: newemail@example.com
- Valid new password: NewPassw0rd!
- Valid new name: Jane Doe
- Valid new username: janedoe
Test Steps:
1. User initiates the profile change process by calling `changeProfile()`.
2. Main system verifies the new data with the Users Database using `verifyValidData(x)`.
3. Users Database verifies the new data and returns the result.
4. Main system confirms successful profile change if `y = true`.

Title: Fail to Change User Profile Due to Invalid Data
Preconditions: A registered user exists in the Users Database.
Test Data:
- Invalid new email: invalidemail
- Invalid new password: short
- Invalid new name: J
- Invalid new username: shrt
Test Steps:
1. User initiates the profile change process by calling `changeProfile()`.
2. Main system verifies the new data with the Users Database using `verifyValidData(x)`.
3. Users Database verifies the new data and returns the result.
4. Main system confirms failed profile change if `y = false`.
Expected Result: - Profile change is confirmed as failed due to invalid data.
